title: WynnTracker
description: A Wynncraft Mod for reporting chat content to a remote server.
body:
WynnTracker is a mod specifically designed to send Wynncraft Chat Data to a remote server of the player's chosing. This mod is primarily intended to be used in conjunction with our custom WynnTracker HTTPS server and Discord bot.

The remote server URL is specifically input by the player without a default option. **By default, no data is sent to any external remote servers.**

### Feaures
- Reporting the completion of Guild Raids
- Reporting the giving out of Guild Aspects
- Live player authentication (No UUID spoofing)
- Owed aspects system (toggleable)

### Instructions
1. Install WynnTracker and all required dependencies.
2. Open the WynnTracker configuration via ModMenu.
3. Enter the Remote Server URL provided to you by your Guild.
4. Click Save 

### Interested in setting up WynnTracker for your Wynncraft Guild? 
Take a look at the [WynnTrackerServer project on GitHub.](https://github.com/wiji1/WynnTrackerServer)
